commit.subject: LU-19235 nodemap: add pool_quota_ops rbac role
commit.message:
LU-19235 nodemap: add pool_quota_ops rbac role

The purpose of the new pool_quota_ops rbac role is to separate pool
specific quotas from UID/GID/ProjID regular quotas. When not set,
clients cannot set pool specific quotas ('lfs setquota --pool').

sanity-sec test_64c is updated to exercise the new pool_quota_ops rbac
role.

Signed-off-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I261485cbf694baf0688ade8466411ce957abd826
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/60534
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Marc Vef <mvef@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
